const WEIGHTS = [
  { key:'nl', label:'Culvert Length (meters)',                default:5  },
  { key:'ne', label:'Culvert Elevation Difference (meters)', default:10 },
  { key:'ns', label:'Slope (%)',                             default:15 },
  { key:'nu', label:'Kilometers Above Barrier (km)',         default:20 },
  { key:'nw', label:'Wetlands',                              default:10 },
  { key:'nr', label:'SARA Species Presence',                 default:20 },
  { key:'nq', label:'Sedimentation (Quintile)',              default:10 },
  { key:'np', label:'Road Priority',                         default:10 },
];

const CLASS_LABELS = {'5':'Very High','4':'High','3':'Moderate','2':'Low','1':'Very Low'};
const CLASS_COLORS = {'5':'var(--c5)','4':'var(--c4)','3':'var(--c3)','2':'var(--c2)','1':'var(--c1)'};

let C1,C2,C3,C4,C5;
let scored=[], visibleScored=[], map, layerGroup;
let attrHighlightId = null;
let sortKey = 'rank', sortAsc = true;
let attrSearchTerm = '';

// ── Weights ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function buildWeights() {
  const sec = document.getElementById('weights-section');
  WEIGHTS.forEach(w => {
    const row = document.createElement('div');
    row.className = 'weight-row';
    row.innerHTML = `
      <span class="weight-name">${w.label}</span>
      <div class="weight-input-wrap">
        <input type="number" class="weight-input" id="wi-${w.key}"
               value="${w.default}" min="0" max="100" oninput="updateTotal()">
        <span class="weight-pct-label">%</span>
      </div>`;
    sec.appendChild(row);
  });
}

function getWeights() {
  return WEIGHTS.map(w => ({
    key: w.key,
    val: Math.max(0, Math.min(100, parseInt(document.getElementById('wi-'+w.key).value)||0))
  }));
}

function updateTotal() {
  const ws=getWeights(), total=ws.reduce((s,w)=>s+w.val,0);
  const pctEl=document.getElementById('total-pct');
  const fillEl=document.getElementById('progress-fill');
  const msgEl=document.getElementById('total-msg');
  const btnEl=document.getElementById('run-btn');
  pctEl.textContent=total+'%';
  fillEl.style.width=Math.min(total,100)+'%';
  if(total===100){
    pctEl.className='ok'; fillEl.style.background='var(--accent)';
    msgEl.textContent=''; btnEl.disabled=false;
  } else {
    pctEl.className='warn'; fillEl.style.background='#e8a030';
    msgEl.textContent=total<100?'Add '+(100-total)+'% to reach 100%':'Remove '+(total-100)+'% to reach 100%';
    btnEl.disabled=true;
  }
}

// ── Scoring ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function scoreAll() {
  const ws=getWeights(), total=ws.reduce((s,w)=>s+w.val,0);
  if(total!==100) return;
  const normW={};
  ws.forEach(w=>normW[w.key]=w.val/100);
  const nonSed=ws.filter(w=>w.key!=='nq').map(w=>w.key);
  const nonSedTotal=nonSed.reduce((s,k)=>s+normW[k],0);

  scored=CULVERT_DATA.map(r=>{
    const sedMeasured=r.nq!==null;
    let eff;
    if(sedMeasured){eff=normW;}
    else{
      eff={};
      nonSed.forEach(k=>eff[k]=nonSedTotal>0?normW[k]/nonSedTotal:0);
      eff['nq']=0;
    }
    let score=0;
    nonSed.forEach(k=>{score+=eff[k]*(parseFloat(r[k])||0);});
    if(sedMeasured) score+=eff['nq']*r.nq;
    return {...r, score:Math.round(score*10000)/10000};
  });

  const sorted=[...scored].sort((a,b)=>a.score-b.score);
  const n=sorted.length;
  const q1=sorted[Math.floor(n*0.20)].score;
  const q2=sorted[Math.floor(n*0.40)].score;
  const q3=sorted[Math.floor(n*0.60)].score;
  const q4=sorted[Math.floor(n*0.80)].score;

  scored.forEach(r=>{
    r.cls=r.score>=q4?'5':r.score>=q3?'4':r.score>=q2?'3':r.score>=q1?'2':'1';
  });
  [...scored].sort((a,b)=>b.score-a.score).forEach((r,i)=>{r.rank=i+1;});

  const minS=sorted[0].score, maxS=sorted[n-1].score;
  document.getElementById('score-range').textContent='Range: '+minS.toFixed(3)+' – '+maxS.toFixed(3);
}

// ── Filters ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function getChecked(groupId) {
  const boxes=document.querySelectorAll('#'+groupId+' input[type=checkbox]');
  const checked=[...boxes].filter(b=>b.checked).map(b=>b.value);
  return checked.length===0?null:checked;
}

function getVisible() {
  const filterCls=document.getElementById('filter-class').value;
  const filterWet=getChecked('filter-wetland');
  const filterSara=getChecked('filter-sara');
  const filterRoad=getChecked('filter-road');
  return scored.filter(r=>{
    if(filterCls && r.cls!==filterCls) return false;
    if(filterWet && !filterWet.includes(r.wet)) return false;
    if(filterSara && !filterSara.includes(r.sar)) return false;
    if(filterRoad && !filterRoad.includes(r.rod)) return false;
    return true;
  });
}

// ── Map render ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function classColor(cls) {
  return {5:C5,4:C4,3:C3,2:C2,1:C1}[cls]||'#888';
}

function renderMap() {
  layerGroup.clearLayers();
  visibleScored=getVisible();
  const counts={5:0,4:0,3:0,2:0,1:0};

  visibleScored.forEach(r=>{
    counts[parseInt(r.cls)]++;
    const color=classColor(parseInt(r.cls));
    const m=L.circleMarker([r.y,r.x],{
      radius:5, fillColor:color, color:'rgba(0,0,0,0.3)', weight:0.5, fillOpacity:0.85
    });

    const bs='background:'+color+'22;color:'+color+';border:1px solid '+color+'44';
    m.bindPopup(`
      <div class="popup-title">
        Culvert #${r.id}
        <span class="popup-badge" style="${bs}">${CLASS_LABELS[r.cls]}</span>
      </div>
      <div class="popup-grid">
        <div><div class="popup-field">River</div><div class="popup-val">${r.riv||'—'}</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Jurisdiction</div><div class="popup-val">${r.jur||'—'}</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Length</div><div class="popup-val">${r.len} m</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Slope</div><div class="popup-val">${r.slp}%</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Km Above Barrier</div><div class="popup-val">${r.upk} km</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Wetland</div><div class="popup-val">${r.wet||'—'}</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">SARA Status</div><div class="popup-val">${r.sar||'—'}</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Sediment Quintile</div><div class="popup-val">${r.sed||'NM'}</div></div>
        <div><div class="popup-field">Road Priority</div><div class="popup-val">${r.rod||'—'}</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="popup-score">
        <div>
          <div class="popup-score-label">Priority Score</div>
          <div class="popup-score-val">${r.score.toFixed(4)}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="popup-rank">Rank #${r.rank}</div>
      </div>
      <button class="popup-table-btn" onclick="openAttrTable(${r.id})">
        &#9776; Open Attribute Table
      </button>
    `,{maxWidth:280});

    layerGroup.addLayer(m);
  });

  ['1','2','3','4','5'].forEach(c=>{
    const n=counts[parseInt(c)];
    document.getElementById('lc'+c).textContent=n.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('h'+c).textContent=n.toLocaleString();
  });

  // Refresh attribute table if open
  if(document.getElementById('attr-panel').classList.contains('open')){
    populateAttrTable();
  }
}

function runScoring()  { scoreAll(); renderMap(); }
function applyFilters(){ if(scored.length>0) renderMap(); }

function clearFilters(){
  document.getElementById('filter-class').value='';
  document.querySelectorAll('.checkbox-group input[type=checkbox]').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false);
  applyFilters();
}

// ── Attribute table ───────────────────────────────────────────────
function openAttrTable(highlightId) {
  attrHighlightId = highlightId || null;
  populateAttrTable();
  document.getElementById('attr-panel').classList.add('open');
  // Scroll to highlighted row after render
  if(attrHighlightId){
    setTimeout(()=>{
      const row=document.querySelector('#attr-body tr.highlight');
      if(row) row.scrollIntoView({block:'center', behavior:'smooth'});
    }, 100);
  }
}

function closeAttrTable(){
  document.getElementById('attr-panel').classList.remove('open');
  attrHighlightId=null;
}

function filterAttrTable(){
  attrSearchTerm=document.getElementById('attr-search').value.toLowerCase();
  populateAttrTable();
}

function sortTable(key){
  if(sortKey===key){ sortAsc=!sortAsc; }
  else { sortKey=key; sortAsc=key==='rank'||key==='cls'; }
  // Update header indicators
  document.querySelectorAll('#attr-table th').forEach(th=>{
    th.classList.remove('sorted');
    th.querySelector('.sort-icon').textContent='↕';
  });
  const headers=['rank','id','cls','score','len','slp','upk','wet','sar','sed','rod','riv'];
  const idx=headers.indexOf(key);
  if(idx>=0){
    const th=document.querySelectorAll('#attr-table th')[idx];
    th.classList.add('sorted');
    th.querySelector('.sort-icon').textContent=sortAsc?'↑':'↓';
  }
  populateAttrTable();
}

function populateAttrTable(){
  let rows=[...visibleScored];

  // Apply search
  if(attrSearchTerm){
    rows=rows.filter(r=>
      String(r.id).includes(attrSearchTerm)||
      (r.riv||'').toLowerCase().includes(attrSearchTerm)||
      CLASS_LABELS[r.cls].toLowerCase().includes(attrSearchTerm)||
      String(r.cls).includes(attrSearchTerm)||
      (r.wet||'').toLowerCase().includes(attrSearchTerm)||
      (r.sar||'').toLowerCase().includes(attrSearchTerm)||
      (r.rod||'').toLowerCase().includes(attrSearchTerm)
    );
  }

  // Sort
  rows.sort((a,b)=>{
    let av=a[sortKey], bv=b[sortKey];
    if(sortKey==='cls'){ av=parseInt(av); bv=parseInt(bv); }
    if(typeof av==='string') av=av.toLowerCase();
    if(typeof bv==='string') bv=bv.toLowerCase();
    if(av===undefined||av===null||av==='') av = sortAsc ? Infinity : -Infinity;
    if(bv===undefined||bv===null||bv==='') bv = sortAsc ? Infinity : -Infinity;
    return sortAsc?(av>bv?1:av<bv?-1:0):(av<bv?1:av>bv?-1:0);
  });

  // Update count
  document.getElementById('attr-count').textContent=rows.length.toLocaleString()+' culverts';
  document.getElementById('attr-title').textContent=
    attrSearchTerm?'Attribute Table (filtered)':'Attribute Table — Active Selection';

  // Render rows
  const tbody=document.getElementById('attr-body');
  tbody.innerHTML='';
  const frag=document.createDocumentFragment();

  rows.forEach(r=>{
    const tr=document.createElement('tr');
    if(r.id===attrHighlightId) tr.className='highlight';
    const color=classColor(parseInt(r.cls));
    const chipStyle=`background:${color}22;color:${color};border:1px solid ${color}44`;
    tr.innerHTML=`
      <td>${r.rank}</td>
      <td>${r.id}</td>
      <td><span class="class-chip" style="${chipStyle}">${r.cls} — ${CLASS_LABELS[r.cls]}</span></td>
      <td>${r.score.toFixed(4)}</td>
      <td>${r.len}</td>
      <td>${r.slp}</td>
      <td>${r.upk}</td>
      <td>${r.wet||'—'}</td>
      <td>${r.sar||'—'}</td>
      <td>${r.sed||'NM'}</td>
      <td>${r.rod||'—'}</td>
      <td>${r.riv||'—'}</td>
    `;
    frag.appendChild(tr);
  });
  tbody.appendChild(frag);
}

// ── Populate checkbox filters ─────────────────────────────────────
function makeCheckboxes(groupId, values){
  const wrap=document.getElementById(groupId);
  values.forEach(v=>{
    const label=document.createElement('label');
    label.className='cb-row';
    label.innerHTML=`<input type="checkbox" value="${v}" onchange="applyFilters()">
                     <span class="cb-label">${v||'(none)'}</span>`;
    wrap.appendChild(label);
  });
}

function populateFilters(){
  const wetlands=[...new Set(CULVERT_DATA.map(r=>r.wet).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  const saras=[...new Set(CULVERT_DATA.map(r=>r.sar).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  const roads=[...new Set(CULVERT_DATA.map(r=>r.rod).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  makeCheckboxes('filter-wetland',wetlands);
  makeCheckboxes('filter-sara',saras);
  makeCheckboxes('filter-road',roads);
}

// ── Init ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{
  const style=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
  C1=style.getPropertyValue('--c1').trim();
  C2=style.getPropertyValue('--c2').trim();
  C3=style.getPropertyValue('--c3').trim();
  C4=style.getPropertyValue('--c4').trim();
  C5=style.getPropertyValue('--c5').trim();

  buildWeights();
  updateTotal();
  populateFilters();

  map=L.map('map',{center:[48.666,-65.907],zoom:9});
  L.tileLayer('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png',{
    attribution:'&copy; OpenStreetMap contributors &copy; CARTO',
    subdomains:'abcd', maxZoom:19
  }).addTo(map);
  layerGroup=L.layerGroup().addTo(map);

  setTimeout(()=>{
    scoreAll(); renderMap();
    document.getElementById('loading').style.display='none';
  },100);
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
